2026-04-22T03:32:45.7029322Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7029855Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7030279Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7030644Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7031148Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7031392Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7032144Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7032336Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7032513Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7032748Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7032954Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7033250Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T03:32:45.7033519Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

Supports advanced search syntax for precise filtering.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort repositories by field, defaults to best match","enum":["stars","forks","help-wanted-issues","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_repositories"}]}}}
